title: Executive dashboard
subtitle: Sales KPIs, trends, and operational snapshot for the selected period.
no_widgets: No dashboard modules are available for your account.

home.welcome_subtitle: Open a module below. Shortcuts match your permissions — the same links as the sidebar.
home.shortcuts_hint: Shortcuts match your permissions — the same links as the sidebar.
home.no_shortcuts: No modules are available for your account. Contact an administrator.
home.no_access_body: Your account is ready, but no role or module permissions have been assigned yet. Update your details in Profile, or contact your system administrator to request access.

role.empty: No data for this view yet.
role.load_error: Could not load one or more panels. Try again later.
role.shortcuts_hint: Jump to common tasks in your permitted modules.

accountant.title: Accounting overview
accountant.subtitle: Period {{from}} → {{to}} (last 30 days)
accountant.no_permission: You do not have accounting read access.
accountant.kpi_tb_hint: Sum of posted debits vs credits across accounts

marketing.title: Marketing overview
marketing.subtitle: Top movers, sales context, and coupon usage.
marketing.period_hint: Applies to sales KPIs and top products.
marketing.top_products_hint: By quantity in the selected window.
marketing.inventory_alerts_hint: Products nearing expiry or low cover.

it.title: System operations
it.subtitle: Health, backups, identity, and notification jobs.
it.backup_running: A backup run is in progress.

hr.title: HR workflow
hr.subtitle: Leave, pending hires, and payroll status.
hr.pending_recruitments_table_hint: New hire setup requests awaiting review.

staff.title: My workplace
staff.subtitle: Your schedule and POS context.
staff.no_terminal: Pick a terminal in POS to track shifts here.
staff.shift_closed: No open shift for the selected terminal.
staff.no_schedule: No weekly schedule is assigned to your account yet.

error.load: Could not load executive KPIs. Try again.

filters.title: Period & branch
filters.hint: Set the report period and sales branch to filter revenue, order count, and charts below.

kpi.revenue_hint: Posted POS invoice sales for the selected period.
kpi.margin_hint: (Sales − standard product cost) ÷ sales. Use the income statement for full P&L.
kpi.orders_hint: Posted sales invoice count (one invoice = one order).
kpi.recent_po_hint: Purchase orders recorded in the selected period.

charts.category_mix_hint: Revenue share by product category for the period.

tables.top_products_hint: Ranked by revenue in the period.
tables.recent_po_hint: Latest purchase orders for supplier follow-up.
